# Athena Data

> Women-owned data consultancy specializing in data migration, data modernization, and data governance. Microsoft-certified architects, engineers, and governance specialists serving enterprise clients across North America.

## About
Athena Data is a certified women-owned (WBE) consultancy of senior Microsoft-certified data practitioners. We engineer trusted data foundations for organizations that cannot afford to get their data wrong.

## Core specializations
- Data Migration: end-to-end migration from legacy databases and on-premise estates to modern cloud platforms with zero data loss, validated lineage, and minimal downtime.
- Data Modernization: re-platforming and re-architecting onto Azure, Microsoft Fabric, and modern lakehouse patterns to enable analytics and AI.
- Data Governance: policy, stewardship, lineage, quality, and compliance frameworks built into daily operations.

## Supporting practices
- Database design & tuning
- Business intelligence
- Data architecture
- Data profiling & modeling

## Pages
- [Home](https://athena-data-data-devs.lovable.app/): overview of capabilities, approach, and contact.

## Contact
- Email: info@athena-dataservices.com
- Coverage: North America
